     The Numbers Business Report

The Kids Are All Right (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,811,365Details
International Box Office $15,464,104
Worldwide Box Office $36,275,469
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two teenaged children get the notion to seek out their biological father and introduce him into the family life that their two mothers have built for them. Once the donor is found, the household will never be the same, as family ties are defined, re-defined, and re-re-defined.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$491,971 (2.4% of total gross)
Legs:5.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$4,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/994 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,546,760

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 9th, 2010 (Limited) by Focus Features
International Releases: August 24th, 2012 (Wide) (Ecuador)
September 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Venezuela)
Video Release: November 16th, 2010 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content, nudity, language and some teen drug and alcohol use
(Rating bulletin 2113 (Cert #46022), 3/24/2010)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Award nomination: 2011 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Golden Globe Winner Best Picture—Musical or Comedy
Film festival: Sundance Film Festival 2010
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Antidote Films, Mandalay Vision, Gilbert Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Two teenaged children get the notion to seek out their biological father and introduce him into the family life that their two mothers have built for them. Once the donor is found, the household will never be the same, as family ties are defined, re-defined, and re-re-defined.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$491,971 (2.4% of total gross)
Legs:5.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$4,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/994 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,546,760

International Releases: August 24th, 2012 (Wide) (Ecuador)
September 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Venezuela)
